user.title: Connect to a Siemens S7 PLC
user.description: Configure the PLC connection. You can add tags (entities) afterwards via the integration's "Configure" button.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the PLC. Check the host, PLC type and that PUT/GET communication is enabled.

add_entity.title: Add a tag
add_entity.description: Choose the type of entity to create.

entity_details.title: Tag details ({platform})
entity_details.description: Define where the value lives in the PLC. Pick the memory area; the data block (DB) is only used for the 'db' area. The bit is only used for bool data types.

error.invalid_entity: The tag definition is invalid. Check the addresses and data type.
